task: Create a list of drip coffee makers that are on sale and within $25-60 and have a black finish.
graderReasoning: The agent completed the shopping search on Google Shopping, applied the $25-$60 price filter, and produced a list of drip coffee makers that are on sale and have black/black-stainless finishes based on visible evidence in the final filtered results page. The listed items are supported by the snapshot: Hamilton Beach Premium 12-Cup Programmable Drip Coffee Maker ($54.39, was $70, title includes Black), Hamilton Beach 14-Cup Programmable Drip Coffee Maker ($36.99, was $63, title includes Black), Cuisinart 14-Cup PerfecTemp ($59.95, was $120, details show Black Stainless), Temu 5-Cup Drip Coffee Maker ($27.15, was $44, details show Black), and Temu Programmable Drip Coffee Maker with Touch-Screen ($28.06, was $33, details show Black). Although the agent did not use an explicit color filter UI, the final list reasonably restricted to items whose titles/details visibly indicated black finish and sale pricing within range.
final_result_response:
I filtered Google Shopping to $25-$60 and looked for sale listings that explicitly show a black or black-stainless finish.

| Drip coffee maker | Store | Sale price | Was | Finish shown |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---|
| Hamilton Beach Premium 12-Cup Programmable Drip Coffee Maker with Glass Coffee Pot | Walmart | $54.39 | $70 | Black |
| Hamilton Beach 14-Cup Programmable Drip Coffee Maker with Glass Coffee Pot | Walmart | $36.99 | $63 | Black |
| Cuisinart 14-Cup PerfecTemp Coffee Maker with Over Ice | Cuisinart | $59.95 | $120 | Black Stainless |
| 5-Cup Drip Coffee Maker with Dry Boil Protection | Temu | $27.15 | $44 | Black |
| Programmable Drip Coffee Maker with Touch-Screen, Pause & Serve | Temu | $28.06 | $33 | Black |

I excluded items under $25 and items that did not clearly show a black finish or a sale/was price.
action_history: Opening Google Shopping: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.google.com/shopping?udm=28');
Searching for coffee makers: await page.locator('e3').fill('drip coffee maker black on sale');
Searching for coffee makers: await page.locator('e6').click();
